messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.competitive-foreclosure.framework-agreements-close-first-buyer","queries":[{"query":"Digital Realty Schneider Electric $373 million framework agreement rack power","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Equinix rack PDU RFQ multi-vendor tender 2024 2025","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center operator global framework agreement PDU procurement term length years","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.competitive-foreclosure.distributor-line-review-lockout","queries":[{"query":"Legrand Raritan Server Technology acquisition intelligent PDU brands","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Rexel Sonepar new electrical product line onboarding without annual line review","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"electrical distributor annual line review cycle exclusivity margin program IT hardware","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.competitive-foreclosure.bundle-pricing-kills-bakeoffs","queries":[{"query":"rack PDU sole source procurement tender $58,000 $130,000","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Central Europe standalone rack PDU tender €250,000 multi-vendor 2024 2025","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"SOM 1% of SAM benchmark hardware startup serviceable obtainable market analog","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.competitive-foreclosure.oem-cell-two-sided-squeeze","queries":[{"query":"Digipower ODM white-label PDU manufacturer Asia OEM pattern","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"rack integrator RFQ non-incumbent intelligent PDU design-in agreement 2025","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"rack integrator PDU vendor selection DCIM compatibility certification case study","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.competitive-foreclosure.intelligent-pdu-concentration-shrinks-serviceable","queries":[{"query":"Omdia intelligent rack PDU vendor market share Legrand Vertiv Schneider Geist","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"data center PDU specification open protocol SNMP Redfish Modbus no vendor lock","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"EN 50600 ecodesign CE TUV rack PDU regulatory compliance serviceable market","kind":"base-rate"}]}]}
